textRun.content: : TikTok LA HQ, 5800 Bristol Parkway, Culver City.
: Outlandish Digital, 1228 3rd Street Promenade, Santa Monica.
: Capture a content library of images and video for two LinkedIn-optimized sizzle reels (one per day).
: High-end corporate aesthetic; professional, polished, and unobtrusive.
: 4K cinema cameras (Sony FX-series preferred), pro audio kit, and studio lighting setup.
: All raw video/photo assets uploaded to the shared Google Drive.
